milestones.name: SIRI pivot — business docs reframed
milestones.notes: All business docs pivoted from angel investor to Startup Denmark

milestones.name: Lead-gen pipeline code-complete
milestones.notes: 11 pipeline steps, 9 scan types, Valdí-gated, evidence-based GDPR, structured findings

milestones.name: Project restructure
milestones.notes: 3-phase restructure: src/, agents/, config/, data/input+output/, docs/

milestones.name: Pi5 Docker architecture designed
milestones.notes: Architecture doc, docker-compose, worker module structure

milestones.name: Test foundation (Sprint 1, Increment 1.1)
milestones.notes: 112 tests passing, 46% coverage. scanner 64%, brief_generator 97%, bucketer 97%, filters 97%, config 100%.

milestones.name: Logging foundation (Sprint 1, Increment 1.2)
milestones.notes: JSONFormatter, --log-format flag, per-scan-type timing, pipeline_complete structured log, 7 tests

milestones.name: Performance baseline (Sprint 1, Increment 1.3)
milestones.notes: scripts/benchmark.py with mock mode, per-stage timing, JSON output. Target: <30s/domain cold cache.

milestones.name: Merge to main (Sprint 1, Increment 1.4)
milestones.notes: Clean git history, merge feature/siri-pivot, update README

milestones.name: Redis cache layer (Sprint 2, Increment 2.1)
milestones.notes: src/worker/cache.py with TTL per scan type, tested with fakeredis

milestones.name: Worker implementation (Sprint 2, Increment 2.2)
milestones.notes: scan_job.py + main.py, Valdí validation on startup, single-domain scan

milestones.name: Full Vejle run on Docker (Sprint 2, Increment 2.5)

external_deadlines.name: Startup Denmark application
external_deadlines.notes: Priority 0 — required for CVR registration. Video pitch script still needed.

external_deadlines.name: NCC-DK grant application
external_deadlines.notes: Requires CVR (post Startup Denmark approval). Phase 2.

blockers.description: Pipeline cannot process 183+ domains in reasonable time without Docker/Redis architecture
blockers.resolution: Sprint 2 — Docker implementation with workers + Redis caching

next_actions: Increment 1.4: clean git history, merge to main, update README, .env.example
